Original Prompt: Count the number of unique 3 to 6 character file extensions are in the /workspace directory tree
Original Command: find /workspace -type f -name "*.*" | grep -o -E "\.[^\.]+$" | grep -o -E "[[:alpha:]]{3,6}" | awk '{print tolower($0)}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
Corrected Command: find /workspace -type f -name '*.*' | awk -F. 'NF>1 {ext=tolower($NF); if (length(ext) >= 3 && length(ext) <= 6) print ext}' | sort | uniq -c | wc -l
Functionally Equivalent Command: find /workspace -type f -name '*.*' | sed -n 's/.*\.//p' | awk '{print tolower($0)}' | grep -E '^[a-z]{3,6}$' | sort -u | wc -l
Notes: Invalid gold command did not accomplish task.
